_comment: Example aictl hooks file. Copy to ~/.aictl/hooks.json (or point AICTL_HOOKS_FILE at this path). Each top-level key is a lifecycle event. Each entry is { matcher, command, timeout, enabled }. Matcher is a glob over tool name (`*`, `?`, `|` alternation); for non-tool events use `*`. Command runs via `sh -c` in the security working dir with a scrubbed env. Stdin gets a JSON payload (event, session_id, cwd, tool, prompt, …). Stdout JSON shapes: {"decision":"block","reason":"..."} aborts the action; {"decision":"approve","reason":"..."} pre-approves a tool call; {"additionalContext":"..."} adds a <hook_context> turn; {"rewrittenPrompt":"..."} (UserPromptSubmit only) replaces the user message. Plain stdout becomes additionalContext. Exit 2 is a shorthand for block (stderr is the reason). Default timeout: 60s.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Refuse prompts that look like a credential dump.
UserPromptSubmit.command: jq -e 'select(.prompt | test("AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}"))' >/dev/null && printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"prompt looks like it contains credentials"}' || true

PreToolUse._comment: Refuse exec_shell calls that try to push to a remote.
PreToolUse.command: jq -r '.tool.input' | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+push' && (echo 'no git push from hooks' >&2; exit 2) || true

PreToolUse._comment: Pre-approve read_file in --auto mode equivalent: skip the y/N prompt for all reads.

PostToolUse._comment: Auto-format Rust after every edit_file or write_file. cargo fmt's stdout is fed back to the model as additional context, so it sees what changed.

Stop._comment: Append a single line to a per-session transcript log when the agent finishes a turn.

PreCompact._comment: Snapshot the session file before compaction discards the raw transcript.

Notification._comment: Mirror desktop notifications to a webhook for remote follow-up.
Notification.command: jq -c '{text: .notification}' | curl -fsS -X POST -H 'content-type: application/json' --max-time 5 -d @- https://example.invalid/aictl 2>/dev/null || true
